title: Article Extractor — Input
description: Extract clean article text + metadata from any URL. Built for LLM/RAG pipelines and news monitoring.

url.title: URL
url.description: A single article URL to extract.

urls.title: URLs
urls.description: Array of article URLs to extract in one run (max 1000).

maxChars.title: Max text length
maxChars.description: Truncate extracted article text to this many characters (default 100,000; max 500,000).
